name: Delete Script
summary: An audio-based mindset program that walks listeners through a short daily routine designed to interrupt recurring negative thought patterns.
best_for: people looking for a simple daily audio routine to work on negative self-talk

name: Forbidden China Wealth
summary: A manifestation-style video program built around an ancient wealth-attraction concept, paired with audio tools meant to shift money mindset.
best_for: manifestation and law-of-attraction audiences interested in wealth mindset content

name: The Money Script
summary: A short audio-and-video 'script' program pitched as a mindset shift for attracting money, in the same binaural-audio style as other manifestation offers.
best_for: listeners of manifestation and abundance audio programs

name: Shifting Vibrations
summary: A manifestation program centered on the idea of raising your personal 'vibration' to attract wealth and opportunity, delivered as video training.

name: MysterySchool Code
summary: A manifestation program framed around teachings attributed to ancient Egyptian mystery schools, presented as a path to unlocking abundance.
best_for: readers drawn to ancient-wisdom framed manifestation content

name: Seraphina Tarot
summary: A personalized online tarot reading service that generates a custom card spread and interpretation from a few details you provide.
best_for: people curious about tarot who want a quick personalized reading

name: Prosperity Birth Code Reading
summary: A personalized 'birth code' reading pitched as revealing a prosperity blueprint based on your birth details, aimed at the wealth-manifestation audience.
best_for: astrology and numerology fans curious about a personalized wealth reading
